Localization.Description: A resource was created in Zabbix

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A detection rule was created on host {event_src.host}
A resource of type "{object.type}" was created on host {event_src.host}
An application configuration was created on host {event_src.host}
A service was created on host {event_src.host}
Application configuration "{object.name}" was created on host {event_src.host}
An application was created on host {event_src.host}
A host was created on host {event_src.host}
Detection rule "{object.name}" was created on host {event_src.host}
Resource "{object.name}" of type "{object.type}" was created on host {event_src.host}
